title: Ideas for AI apps?

posts.author: TomFri (Tom Fridman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi y’all
Did you know that monday has many marketplace partners developing amazing apps and solutions for our users?

New AI capabilities have opened up a whole new world of possibilities, and we are as eager as you are to discover them. So please share with us - what is your dream application of generative AI on the monday platform?

posts.author: Lior_Marketplace (Lior Reiner)
posts.cookedHtml:
I will start. a board generator to create the optimal board for each task!
Or - notification summary

posts.author: Yoni_Leivn (Yoni levin)
posts.cookedHtml: My personal one is automatic generate summary of daily progress of my dev team out of sprint management board
